rewritten_requirements: The system shall create a unique Health ID based on mobile number or Aadhaar number.
The system shall store all health-related information of a person in the National Health ID repository.
The system shall allow patients to create their Health ID digitally.
The system shall link each Health ID with a health data consent manager, such as the National Digital Health Mission (NDHM).
The system shall seek patient's consent for the seamless flow of health information from the Personal Health Records module.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Create a unique Health ID based on mobile number or Aadhaar number
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: According to this proposal, every Indian will get a unique Health ID based on their mobile number or Aadhaar number.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Store all health-related information of a person in the National Health ID repository
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The National Health ID will be a repository of all health-related information of a person.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Allow patients to create their Health ID digitally
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: every patient who wishes to have their health records available digitally must start by creating a Health ID

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Link each Health ID with a health data consent manager (such as NDHM)
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Each Health ID will be linked to a health data consent manager – such as the National Digital Health Mission (NDHM)

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Seek patient's consent for seamless flow of health information from Personal Health Records module
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: allow for seamless flow of health information from the Personal Health Records module
